changes: 🐛 Fix message action sheet (Reply/Copy/More) overlapping bottom navigation bar
🐛 Fix app dock bar touching system 3-button navigation bar
🐛 Fix chat input bar touching system 3-button navigation bar
🐛 Fix Firebase listener memory leak — listeners now properly removed on sign-out
🐛 Fix presence tracker writing wrong disconnect timestamp
🐛 Fix duplicate update check on app start causing two network requests
🐛 Fix hard-coded bottom padding in home screen ignoring nav bar height
🐛 Fix PDF last-read page lost when URL changes
🐛 Fix session time uncapped — now limited to 2 hours max
🧹 Remove dead code blocks from HomeScreen and navigation graph
✨ App now loads subjects without internet using offline cache
🔒 PDF share in chat — Videos and PDFs marked Coming Soon
title: Bug Fixes & Improvements
